steps.title: Interpret the input
steps.content:
The function input $t$ represents years after $1990$. For $P(25)$, the year is:
$$1990+25=2015$$

steps.title: Interpret the output
steps.content: The value $P(25)=560$ means the predicted population is $560$ when $t=25$, which is the year $2015$. The answer is C.
